steps.title: Locate the direct statement
steps.content: The text says Lillian Bennett soon became leader of the Cambridge Nonviolent Action Committee. It then states that she was also the leader of what became known as the Cambridge movement.

steps.title: Use the named movement
steps.content: A invents a business, C changes the issue to environmental protections, and D invents a school. The passage directly names the Cambridge movement as something Bennett led. The answer is B.
